notes: Brooklyn Public Library Walt Whitman branch page (Fort Greene area programming while the branch is closed for renovations). Storytime in Fort Greene Park is listed on the branch events feed with librarians leading songs, picture books, and play.

Walt Whitman Library building at 93 Saint Edwards Street is closed for renovations; storytime meets outdoors in Fort Greene Park unless the event page announces a rain location.

document.name: Brooklyn Public Library — Storytime in Fort Greene Park
document.address: Fort Greene Park (NW corner, monument stairs area); rain plan: Walt Whitman Pop-up Library, 240 Nassau Street, 2nd Floor, Brooklyn, NY 11201
document.shortDescription: Free outdoor BPL storytime in Fort Greene Park: songs, picture books, and play with Walt Whitman Library staff (check discover.bklynlibrary.org for dates).
document.longDescription:
While Walt Whitman Library is closed for renovations, Brooklyn Public Library staff continue Fort Greene programming listed on the branch page, including Storytime in Fort Greene Park. Event listings describe librarians leading singing, picture books read aloud, and play for children of all ages and their caregivers. Sessions are typically scheduled on Wednesday mornings around 11:00 a.m. at the bottom of the monument stairs in Fort Greene Park's northwest corner.

The branch notes that inclement weather may move storytime indoors to the Walt Whitman Pop-up Library at 240 Nassau Street (2nd floor). The associated Walt Whitman Library address is 93 Saint Edwards Street, Brooklyn, NY 11205; branch phone 718-935-0244.

Sources: https://www.bklynlibrary.org/locations/walt-whitman https://www.bklynlibrary.org/calendar/list/storytime https://discover.bklynlibrary.org/?event=true&eventlocation=Walt+Whitman+Library
document.announcementDescription: Rain may move storytime to the Walt Whitman Pop-up Library—see the BPL event listing the day before.
